notes.unsafe_evidence_paths: strict oracle rejects without resolving outside pack root

artifact-hash-mismatch.notes: Artifact exists; declared hash does not match actual SHA-256.

missing-artifact.notes: Evidence source.path is relative and under pack root but file is absent.

missing-evidence-ref.notes: Graph evidence_refs point at an id absent from evidence/index.jsonl. Evidence row uses OpenCrab-legal URL-only source (url + path:null) so the official missing_evidence_ref failure is isolated from strict local artifact provenance.
